title: Simplify Server Layer

tasks.description: Consolidate tool handlers into category files - Split toolHandlers.ts (301 lines) into handlers/entity.ts, handlers/search.ts, handlers/graph.ts, handlers/io.ts with single registry in handlers/index.ts
Reduce tool definition verbosity - Shorten descriptions to single line, remove redundant field descriptions in toolDefinitions.ts (760 lines)
Create shared schema builders - Extract common schema patterns (entityName, entityNames, importance, tags, pagination) to reduce duplication in tool definitions
Remove async from synchronous operations - Make getEntity(), getRelation(), and search helper methods synchronous when reading from cache, add async wrappers for cold-start

notes: This sprint cleans up the server layer. The JSDoc removal script (Task 5.5 in original plan) is optional and can be skipped if time is constrained. Focus on the handler reorganization and async/sync cleanup.
